markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Quinn Vandecasteele wins the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Qualifying after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Qualifying after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Quinn Vandecasteele win the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky: Qualifying match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Daniel Milavsky wins the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Qualifying after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Newport Qualifying after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Daniel Milavsky win the Vandecasteele vs Milavsky: Qualifying match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Miro Muheim records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Colombia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Colombia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: Miro Muheim: First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Seiya Suzuki records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Chicago C vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 6:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Seiya Suzuki is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Seiya Suzuki starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Seiya Suzuki is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Seiya Suzuki is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Seiya Suzuki: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?
